accessibility_requirements.test_method: manual keyboard sweep and focus-order check
focus visibility check under sticky UI
verify non-drag alternative for drag actions

context_constraints.description: Operator may run workflows from a phone in the ChatGPT UI.
context_constraints.mitigation: Keep stages bounded and return a single bundle plus checksum.
context_constraints.name: Mobile-first execution

context_constraints.description: Chat text cannot be the only source of workflow state.
context_constraints.mitigation: Write receipts, handoffs, schemas, fixtures, and checksums.
context_constraints.name: Artifact persistence

operator_profiles.primary_goal: Run governed stages in a phone-safe ChatGPT UI without losing artifacts.
Use produced learning artifacts with accessible controls and clear feedback.

platform_requirements.requirement: single bundled artifact with checksum and short continuation prompt
touch targets and drag alternatives are required for student-facing outputs
platform_requirements.test_method: accessibility gate and UI smoke check

ux_risks.impact: operator cannot continue governed workflow reliably
ux_risks.mitigation: write latest handoff and return one bundle plus sidecar

ux_risks.impact: some users cannot complete the activity
ux_risks.mitigation: require WCAG 2.2 core checks before promotion
ux_risks.risk: student-facing controls inaccessible by keyboard or touch
